bird.name: Greater yellowlegs
bird.summary: The greater yellowlegs (Tringa melanoleuca) is a large shorebird in the family Scolopacidae. It breeds in central Canada and southern Alask…

locations.name: 中美洲
locations.summary: 中美洲（英語：Central America，西班牙語：América central）是一個地理概念。依據不同的劃分法，屬於北美洲或南美洲的一部分，一般指連接北美洲與南美洲之間的地峽，現有七個國家（若算入墨西哥則為八個）。 範圍 範圍北…

relations.subject: Greater yellowlegs
relations.evidence: It breeds in central Canada and southern Alaska and winters in southern North America, Central America, the West Indies and South America

relations.subject: Greater yellowlegs
relations.evidence: Their breeding habitat is bogs and marshes in the boreal forest region of Canada and Alaska
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
